sn22.35:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu; yamahaṁ bhagavato dhammaṁ sutvā eko vūpakaṭṭho, appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan"ti.
sn22.35:1.2: "Yaṁ kho, bhikkhu, anuseti, tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati; yaṁ nānuseti, na tena saṅkhaṁ gacchatī"ti.
sn22.35:2.2:
2
"Yathā kathaṁ pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsī"ti?
sn22.35:2.3: "Rūpañce, bhante, anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. vedanāñce anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. Saññañce anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. Saṅkhāre ce anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. Viññāṇañce anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati.
sn22.35:2.4: Rūpañce, bhante, nānuseti na tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. vedanāñce … saññañce … saṅkhāre ce … viññāṇañce nānuseti na tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati.
sn22.35:2.5: Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī"ti.
sn22.35:3.2:
3
"Sādhu sādhu, bhikkhu. Sādhu kho tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi. Rūpañce, bhikkhu, anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. vedanāñce … saññañce … saṅkhāre ce … viññāṇañce anuseti tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. Rūpañce, bhikkhu, nānuseti na tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. vedanāñce … saññañce … saṅkhāre ce … viññāṇañce nānuseti na tena saṅkhaṁ gacchati. Imassa kho, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena, bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo"ti.
sn22.35:4.2:
4
Atha kho so bhikkhu bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinanditvā anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi.
sn22.35:4.3:
5
Atha kho so bhikkhu eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihāranto nacirasseva – yassatthāya kulaputtā sammadeva agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajanti, tadanuttaraṁ – brahmacariyapariyosānaṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihāsi. "Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā"ti abbhaññāsi. Aññataro ca pana so bhikkhu arahataṁ ahosīti.
Tatiyaṁ.
